$comment: AAG Self-Hosting Completion — AAG framework が articulate rigor (= 意味 / 境界 / 依存関係) を要求する framework であるにも関わらず、entry navigation level でその rigor を満たしていない self-contradiction を解消する structural reorganization。R1 (AAG sub-tree relocation) → R2 (drawer + protocols + operations relocate) → R3 (references/ directory rename) → R4 (per-element directory + dashboard layer) → R5 (operational-protocol-system M1-M5 deliverable landing) → R6 (AAG self-hosting closure articulate update) → R7 (verify + archive)。1,000+ inbound update + 138 guard / collector path 変更を伴う、AAG Pilot の 5-10 倍 scope。詳細: projects/aag-self-hosting-completion/projectization.md / plan.md。
title: AAG Self-Hosting Completion — references + aag + projects 構造再編による AAG-REQ-SELF-HOSTING 真の closure 達成
